title: machaeranthera australis
intro: Machaeranthera australis, also known as Australian clusterless or australis greenthread, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Machaeranthera australis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to address various health issues, such as arthritis and skin conditions.
